etcd-io__etcd-21757.patch:
diff --git a/pkg/traceutil/trace.go b/pkg/traceutil/trace.go
index f89ba83c9..9498b6a0e 100644
--- a/pkg/traceutil/trace.go
+++ b/pkg/traceutil/trace.go
@@ -200,7 +200,7 @@ func (t *Trace) logInfo(threshold time.Duration) (string, []zap.Field) {
 	endTime := time.Now()
 	totalDuration := endTime.Sub(t.startTime)
 	traceNum := rand.Int31()
-	msg := fmt.Sprintf("trace[%d] %s", traceNum, t.operation)
+	msg := "trace"
 
 	var steps []string
 	lastStepTime := t.startTime
@@ -228,13 +228,15 @@ func (t *Trace) logInfo(threshold time.Duration) (string, []zap.Field) {
 		}
 		stepDuration := tstep.time.Sub(lastStepTime)
 		if stepDuration > threshold {
-			steps = append(steps, fmt.Sprintf("trace[%d] '%v' %s (duration: %v)",
-				traceNum, tstep.msg, writeFields(tstep.fields), stepDuration))
+			steps = append(steps, fmt.Sprintf("'%v' %s (duration: %v)",
+				tstep.msg, writeFields(tstep.fields), stepDuration))
 		}
 		lastStepTime = tstep.time
 	}
 
 	fs := []zap.Field{
+		zap.Int32("trace_id", traceNum),
+		zap.String("operation", t.operation),
 		zap.String("detail", writeFields(t.fields)),
 		zap.Duration("duration", totalDuration),
 		zap.Time("start", t.startTime),

 		}
 		stepDuration := tstep.time.Sub(lastStepTime)
 		if stepDuration > threshold {
-			steps = append(steps, fmt.Sprintf("trace[%d] '%v' %s (duration: %v)",
-				traceNum, tstep.msg, writeFields(tstep.fields), stepDuration))
+			steps = append(steps, fmt.Sprintf("'%v' %s (duration: %v)",
+				tstep.msg, writeFields(tstep.fields), stepDuration))

 	fs := []zap.Field{
+		zap.Int32("trace_id", traceNum),
+		zap.String("op", t.operation),
 		zap.String("detail", writeFields(t.fields)),
 		zap.Duration("duration", totalDuration),

kubernetes__kubernetes-138930.patch:
diff --git a/pkg/kubelet/prober/prober_manager.go b/pkg/kubelet/prober/prober_manager.go
index 025375bc5e7..1de9a39c00b 100644
--- a/pkg/kubelet/prober/prober_manager.go
+++ b/pkg/kubelet/prober/prober_manager.go
@@ -196,7 +196,7 @@ func (m *manager) AddPod(ctx context.Context, pod *v1.Pod) {
 			if _, ok := m.workers[key]; ok {
 				logger.V(8).Info("Startup probe already exists for container",
 					"pod", klog.KObj(pod), "containerName", c.Name)
-				return
+				continue
 			}
 			w := newWorker(m, startup, pod, c)
 			m.workers[key] = w
@@ -208,7 +208,7 @@ func (m *manager) AddPod(ctx context.Context, pod *v1.Pod) {
 			if _, ok := m.workers[key]; ok {
 				logger.V(8).Info("Readiness probe already exists for container",
 					"pod", klog.KObj(pod), "containerName", c.Name)
-				return
+				continue
 			}
 			w := newWorker(m, readiness, pod, c)
 			m.workers[key] = w
@@ -220,7 +220,7 @@ func (m *manager) AddPod(ctx context.Context, pod *v1.Pod) {
 			if _, ok := m.workers[key]; ok {
 				logger.V(8).Info("Liveness probe already exists for container",
 					"pod", klog.KObj(pod), "containerName", c.Name)
-				return
+				continue
 			}
 			w := newWorker(m, liveness, pod, c)
 			m.workers[key] = w

kubernetes__kubernetes-136817.patch:
diff --git a/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go b/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go
index 24044f8706d..6e5e903da4d 100644
--- a/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go
+++ b/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go
@@ -625,7 +625,17 @@ func (gc *GarbageCollector) attemptToDeleteItem(ctx context.Context, item *node)
 		// FinalizerDeletingDependents from the item, resulting in the final
 		// deletion of the item.
 		policy := metav1.DeletePropagationForeground
-		return gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		err = gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
+			// the item has been deleted already. Enqueue a virtual delete event to
+			// remove the node from the graph.
+			logger.V(5).Info("item not found during deletion, generating a virtual delete event",
+				"item", item.identity,
+			)
+			gc.dependencyGraphBuilder.enqueueVirtualDeleteEvent(item.identity)
+			return enqueuedVirtualDeleteEventErr
+		}
+		return err
 	default:
 		// item doesn't have any solid owner, so it needs to be garbage
 		// collected. Also, none of item's owners is waiting for the deletion of
@@ -646,7 +656,17 @@ func (gc *GarbageCollector) attemptToDeleteItem(ctx context.Context, item *node)
 			"item", item.identity,
 			"propagationPolicy", policy,
 		)
-		return gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		err = gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
+			// the item has been deleted already. Enqueue a virtual delete event to
+			// remove the node from the graph.
+			logger.V(5).Info("item not found during deletion, generating a virtual delete event",
+				"item", item.identity,
+			)
+			gc.dependencyGraphBuilder.enqueueVirtualDeleteEvent(item.identity)
+			return enqueuedVirtualDeleteEventErr
+		}
+		return err
 	}
 }

diff --git a/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go b/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go
index 24044f8706d..975acd87b8f 100644
--- a/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go
+++ b/pkg/controller/garbagecollector/garbagecollector.go
@@ -625,7 +625,17 @@ func (gc *GarbageCollector) attemptToDeleteItem(ctx context.Context, item *node)
 		// FinalizerDeletingDependents from the item, resulting in the final
 		// deletion of the item.
 		policy := metav1.DeletePropagationForeground
-		return gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		err = gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
+			// object was already deleted, enqueue a virtual delete event to
+			// update the graph and clean up the node.
+			logger.V(5).Info("item not found during deletion, generating a virtual delete event",
+				"item", item.identity,
+			)
+			gc.dependencyGraphBuilder.enqueueVirtualDeleteEvent(item.identity)
+			return enqueuedVirtualDeleteEventErr
+		}
+		return err
 	default:
 		// item doesn't have any solid owner, so it needs to be garbage
 		// collected. Also, none of item's owners is waiting for the deletion of
@@ -646,7 +656,17 @@ func (gc *GarbageCollector) attemptToDeleteItem(ctx context.Context, item *node)
 			"item", item.identity,
 			"propagationPolicy", policy,
 		)
-		return gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		err = gc.deleteObject(item.identity, latest.ResourceVersion, latest.OwnerReferences, &policy)
+		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
+			// object was already deleted, enqueue a virtual delete event to
+			// update the graph and clean up the node.
+			logger.V(5).Info("item not found during deletion, generating a virtual delete event",
+				"item", item.identity,
+			)
+			gc.dependencyGraphBuilder.enqueueVirtualDeleteEvent(item.identity)
+			return enqueuedVirtualDeleteEventErr
+		}
+		return err
 	}
 }

kubernetes__kubernetes-135981.patch:
diff --git a/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go b/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go
index 2e9e5c09b35..f1994b6e4a8 100644
--- a/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go
+++ b/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go
@@ -610,8 +610,12 @@ func (p *PriorityQueue) runPreEnqueuePlugin(ctx context.Context, logger klog.Log
 		// No need to change GatingPlugin; it's overwritten by the next PreEnqueue plugin if they gate this pod, or it's overwritten with an empty string if all PreEnqueue plugins pass.
 		return s
 	}
-	pInfo.UnschedulablePlugins.Insert(pl.Name())
-	metrics.UnschedulableReason(pl.Name(), pod.Spec.SchedulerName).Inc()
+	if !pInfo.UnschedulablePlugins.Has(pl.Name()) {
+		// Only increment the metric if the plugin wasn't already tracked,
+		// to avoid over-counting when PreEnqueue fails for a plugin already in UnschedulablePlugins.
+		metrics.UnschedulableReason(pl.Name(), pod.Spec.SchedulerName).Inc()
+		pInfo.UnschedulablePlugins.Insert(pl.Name())
+	}
 	pInfo.GatingPlugin = pl.Name()
 	pInfo.GatingPluginEvents = p.pluginToEventsMap[pInfo.GatingPlugin]
 	if s.Code() == fwk.Error {

diff --git a/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go b/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go
index 2e9e5c09b35..7fd82cfc504 100644
--- a/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go
+++ b/pkg/scheduler/backend/queue/scheduling_queue.go
@@ -610,8 +610,10 @@ func (p *PriorityQueue) runPreEnqueuePlugin(ctx context.Context, logger klog.Log
 		// No need to change GatingPlugin; it's overwritten by the next PreEnqueue plugin if they gate this pod, or it's overwritten with an empty string if all PreEnqueue plugins pass.
 		return s
 	}
-	pInfo.UnschedulablePlugins.Insert(pl.Name())
-	metrics.UnschedulableReason(pl.Name(), pod.Spec.SchedulerName).Inc()
+	if !pInfo.UnschedulablePlugins.Has(pl.Name()) {
+		metrics.UnschedulableReason(pl.Name(), pod.Spec.SchedulerName).Inc()
+		pInfo.UnschedulablePlugins.Insert(pl.Name())
+	}
 	pInfo.GatingPlugin = pl.Name()
 	pInfo.GatingPluginEvents = p.pluginToEventsMap[pInfo.GatingPlugin]
 	if s.Code() == fwk.Error {

kubernetes__kubernetes-135749.patch:
diff --git a/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go b/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go
index 191482784c6..39686c6cc4a 100644
--- a/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go
+++ b/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go
@@ -1191,7 +1191,9 @@ func (s *Server) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
 	defer servermetrics.HTTPInflightRequests.WithLabelValues(method, path, serverType, longRunning).Dec()
 
 	startTime := time.Now()
-	defer servermetrics.HTTPRequestsDuration.WithLabelValues(method, path, serverType, longRunning).Observe(servermetrics.SinceInSeconds(startTime))
+	defer func() {
+		servermetrics.HTTPRequestsDuration.WithLabelValues(method, path, serverType, longRunning).Observe(servermetrics.SinceInSeconds(startTime))
+	}()
 
 	handler.ServeHTTP(w, req)
 }

diff --git a/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go b/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go
index 191482784c6..9506177de6d 100644
--- a/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go
+++ b/pkg/kubelet/server/server.go
@@ -1191,7 +1191,7 @@ func (s *Server) ServeHTTP(w http.ResponseWriter, req *http.Request) {
 	defer servermetrics.HTTPInflightRequests.WithLabelValues(method, path, serverType, longRunning).Dec()
 
 	startTime := time.Now()
-	defer servermetrics.HTTPRequestsDuration.WithLabelValues(method, path, serverType, longRunning).Observe(servermetrics.SinceInSeconds(startTime))
+	defer func() { servermetrics.HTTPRequestsDuration.WithLabelValues(method, path, serverType, longRunning).Observe(servermetrics.SinceInSeconds(startTime)) }()
 
 	handler.ServeHTTP(w, req)
 }

--- a/pkg/traceutil/trace.go

@@ -200,7 +200,6 @@ func (t *Trace) logInfo(threshold time.Duration) (string, []zap.Field) {
 	endTime := time.Now()
 	totalDuration := endTime.Sub(t.startTime)
 	traceNum := rand.Int31()
-	msg := fmt.Sprintf("trace[%d] %s", traceNum, t.operation)
 
 	var steps []string
 	lastStepTime := t.startTime
@@ -235,6 +234,8 @@ func (t *Trace) logInfo(threshold time.Duration) (string, []zap.Field) {
 	}
 
 	fs := []zap.Field{
+		zap.String("operation", t.operation),
+		zap.Int32("trace_id", traceNum),
 		zap.String("detail", writeFields(t.fields)),
 		zap.Duration("duration", totalDuration),
 		zap.Time("start", t.startTime),
@@ -242,7 +243,7 @@ func (t *Trace) logInfo(threshold time.Duration) (string, []zap.Field) {
 		zap.Strings("steps", steps),
 		zap.Int("step_count", len(steps)),
 	}
-	return msg, fs
+	return "trace", fs
 }
 
 func (t *Trace) updateFieldIfExist(f Field) bool {

diff --git a/pkg/traceutil/trace.go b/pkg/traceutil/trace.go
index f89ba83c9..b6d388cb9 100644
--- a/pkg/traceutil/trace.go
+++ b/pkg/traceutil/trace.go
@@ -200,7 +200,8 @@ func (t *Trace) logInfo(threshold time.Duration) (string, []zap.Field) {
 	endTime := time.Now()
 	totalDuration := endTime.Sub(t.startTime)
 	traceNum := rand.Int31()
-	msg := fmt.Sprintf("trace[%d] %s", traceNum, t.operation)
+	// Use stable message name; trace number and operation are structured fields
+	msg := "trace"
 
 	var steps []string
 	lastStepTime := t.startTime
@@ -237,6 +238,8 @@ func (t *Trace) logInfo(threshold time.Duration) (string, []zap.Field) {
 	fs := []zap.Field{
 		zap.String("detail", writeFields(t.fields)),
 		zap.Duration("duration", totalDuration),
+		zap.Int32("trace_id", traceNum),
+		zap.String("operation", t.operation),
 		zap.Time("start", t.startTime),
 		zap.Time("end", endTime),
 		zap.Strings("steps", steps),
